title: April Fools
description: This modpack includes nearly every feature in almost all April Fools' updates!
body:
![April Fools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd0005eedfadf352a626e581b01f67c9578617be.png)
---
Prepare to experience the wildest and wackiest additions from Mojang's April Fools' updates, all crammed into one delightfully chaotic modpack. From infinite dimensions to 3D Shareware graphics, and much, much more. If you're looking for unpredictable fun and a break from the ordinary, this is definitely the modpack for you!

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7e41f3f741cee597a37928ede40f67b6e9056b2.png)

|🟢|Content from the April Fools update|
|:-:|:-:|
|🟡|**Custom content NOT from the April Fools update**|
|🔴|**Content exists in the April Fools update but NOT in this modpack**|

<details>
<summary>Locked Chest</summary>
  🟢 Locked Chest
  
  ![Locked Chest GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4bc589ea86971dcbc8ba7fc25b9de6cf6c52f1e.png)
  ---
  🟡 Minecraft Store Items
  
  ![Minecraft Store Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0248fbaa7f63574d9a629c7dacca7308869dbb70.png)
  ---
  🔴 [Minecraft Store](https://minecraft.wiki/images/thumb/Minecraft_store_april_fool_1.png/800px-Minecraft_store_april_fool_1.png?7869c).
</details>
<details>
<summary>Java Edition 2.0</summary>
  🟢 Etho slab, Burnt-out Torch and Tinted glass
  
  🟡 "Block of Charcoal" instead of "Block of Coal" like the April Fools update

  ![An image of all the features listed above](https://i.imgur.com/ITlOFWP.png)
  ---
  🟢 Horses, ponies, pink wither, diamond chicken and redstone bug
  
  ![An image of the feature listed above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e49d0f941a263992a9f5127c89bc7757b1f855d.png)
  ---
  🔴 Super Hostile Mode, Speech bubbles, Super HD Graphics, Fatness, Floppers, Heat,...
</details>
<details>
<summary>Love and Hugs Update</summary>
  🟢 Obsidian Boat, Potion of Sharing, Splash Potion of Sharing, Lingering Potion of Sharing
  
  🟢 Wooden Heart, Stone Heart, Iron Heart, Golden Heart, Diamond Heart and Heart Arrow
  
  🟡 Netherite Heart, and a lot more I think

  ![An image of all the features listed above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dafdb81292c77dece71fa0c1efde4c8337328fcd.png)
  ---
  
  🔴 Potion of Caring, Pink hearts clouds, Hearts particles, Superflat QR code,...
</details>
<details>
<summary>Trendy Update</summary>
  🟢 USB Charger Block, Reality Vision, Ankle Monitor and Smarter Watch
  
  ![An image of all the features listed above](https://i.imgur.com/AdXzMcG.png)
  ---
  🔴 3D minimap, OBEY signs, Smarter Watch's time,...
</details>
<details>
<summary>3D Shareware v1.34</summary>
  🟢 Red key, Blue key, Yellow key, 3D, Boss mode, Nerd Creeper
  
  🟡 Red door, Blue door, Yellow door
  
  ![An image of all the features listed above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a167a94847c89f546d8f792379f1e4f9927f4a0.png)
  ---
  🟢 Cheat codes - Now require "/" at the start. For example, "/NEEEERD" instead of "NEEEERD"
  
  ![/NEEEERD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2438165b18bbcde77ccc607aa4198c6bef32b76.png)
  ---
  🟢 Default Max Framerate to 30 FPS, 8-bit graphics and sounds (Thanks to [8-Bit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/8-bit) for the GUI textures!)
  
  ![An image of the feature listed above](https://i.imgur.com/ZlzbVSY.png)
  ---
  🟢 Flatten Entities
  
  ![An image of the feature listed above](https://i.imgur.com/2ubk0hO.png)
  ---
  🔴 DOS Loading screen, All Custom Difficulties, RPG style HUD, Fire Barrel, Demo mode,...
</details>
<details>
<summary>20w14∞</summary>
  🟢 ALMOST everything from this April Fools Update, including the 43 hard-coded easter egg dimensions.

  ![An image of the feature listed above](https://i.imgur.com/B0kGBno.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Minecraft Plus!</summary>
  🟡 Insert the screensaver into the gameplay itself ;)
  
  ![An image of the feature listed above](https://i.imgur.com/C1y8CzC.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>One Block at a Time Update</summary>
  🟢 Carry entities and chests by crouching and right clicking it
  
  ![An image of the feature listed above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c35d653abb6ae94cd52ee4738822c011ad4e142a.png)
  🔴 Everything else...
</details>
<details>
<summary>Poisonous Potato Update</summary>
  🟢 Everything from this April Fools Update!!
  
  ![An image of all the features listed above](https://i.imgur.com/G39bfPS.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Extra custom content!</summary>
  🟡 I'm too lazy to review the hundreds of custom content additions by Refooled ;)
  
  ![Items showcase](https://iili.io/3W9Foml.webp)
</details>
